SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF ANDDEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF ANDDEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAMIOS II, CONSTANTINE J. DBA  DOCTOR ENDURO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOULIHAN, MONICA TAG STUDIO PATTERN MAKING SERVICE $1,130.11 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,230.11 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HOULIHAN, MONICA TAG STUDIO PATTERN MAKING SERVICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SAMIOS II, CONSTANTINE J. DBA  DOCTOR ENDURO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HOULIHAN, MONICA TAG STUDIO PATTERN MAKING SERVICE
